texto: I prefer solitude to companions, since there are so few men who are trustworthy, and almost none truly learned. I do not say this because I demand scholarship in all men -- although the sum total of men's learning is small enough; but I question whether we should allow anyone to waste our time. The wasting of time is an abomination.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Girolamo Cardano sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I prefer solitude to companions, since there are so few men who are trustworthy, and almost none …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amizade, companionship, friends, útil em momentos de termino e friends.
